title: panicum scabrum var. submuticum
intro: Panicum scabrum var. submuticum, also known as the "rough panic grass", is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Panicum scabrum var. submuticum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
